title: Global coral cover remaining vs. 1970s baseline (%)

source.name: Status of Coral Reefs of the World 2020

notes: Illustrative; global live coral cover estimated ~30-40% of 1970s extent by 2020. GCRMN 2020 report found ~50% decline in hard coral cover since 1950s. Values here represent hard coral cover as a percentage of historical baseline.
